title: Rosh HaAyin Heat Wave
lead: A critical heat wave is affecting Rosh HaAyin with a Z-Score of +3.31. The city is experiencing extremely high temperatures, with a Score of 10.0/10.
body:
The heat wave has brought extremely high temperatures to Rosh HaAyin, with a CDD of 10.6 GG. 
 The relative humidity is at 26%, and the wind speed is 7.3 km/h, exacerbating the heat. 
 The HDD is at 0.0 GG, indicating no heating degree days, and the focus is on cooling.
conclusion: Implement immediate heat mitigation measures to protect the population.
